title: Morning Gratitude
content: Start your day by listing 3 things you are grateful for. This shifts your focus to positive aspects of life.

title: Hydration Reminder
content: Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily. Dehydration can affect mood and cognitive function.

title: Digital Detox Hour
content: Spend one hour daily without screens. Read a book, take a walk, or practice a hobby instead.

title: Mindful Eating
content: Eat slowly, savor each bite, and pay attention to hunger and fullness cues. This improves digestion and satisfaction.

title: Nature Connection
content: Spend at least 20 minutes in nature daily. Green spaces reduce cortisol levels and improve mood.

title: Evening Reflection
content: Before bed, reflect on one thing that went well today and one thing you learned. This builds positive neural pathways.

title: Acts of Kindness
content: Perform one small act of kindness daily. Helping others boosts your own happiness and sense of purpose.

title: Creative Expression
content: Engage in creative activities like drawing, writing, or music for 15 minutes. Creativity is therapeutic and reduces stress.

title: Stretch Break
content: Every 90 minutes, stand up and stretch for 2-3 minutes. This reduces physical tension and refreshes your mind.

title: Deep Breathing Moment
content: Take 3 deep breaths before starting any new task. This centers your attention and reduces reactive stress.
